hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if [ "$CMD" = 'rm -rf /' ]; then echo 'BLOCKED: rm -rf / is not allowed' >&2; exit 2; fi
hooks.name: block-rm-rf-root

hooks.command: FILE_PATHS=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -n "$FILE_PATHS" ] && for FILE in $FILE_PATHS; do if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs|json|md|yaml)$ ]] && [[ ! "$FILE" =~ (CLAUDE|claude)\.md$ ]]; then bunx prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; done
hooks.name: prettier-autoformat

hooks.command: FILE_PATHS=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | tr '\n' ' '); [ -n "$FILE_PATHS" ] && for FILE in $FILE_PATHS; do if [[ "$FILE" =~ \.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|mjs|cjs)$ ]] && [[ ! "$FILE" =~ (CLAUDE|claude)\.md$ ]]; then bunx oxlint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; done
hooks.name: oxlint-autofix
